title: Epic Villain Entrance
summary: 30-second theatrical villain theme  -  ominous brass, harpsichord, gong, never actually scary.
prompt: A theatrical villain-entrance theme at 96 BPM, 30 seconds. Ominous low brass swells, sinister staccato strings, harpsichord menacing arpeggio, big timpani hits on the downbeats, dark cathedral choir "oh" on the climax, deep gong resonance. Over-the-top dramatic  -  meant to make the listener grin. Cinematic supervillain entrance, never actually scary.
